last_sleep_summary: Shipped a recall-engine overhaul + continuous capture to main (PRs #1, #2). Batch 1: BM25F field weighting, recency/status re-rank, TR/EN stemming + synonyms, Haiku index relevance-ranking — lifting recall@1 68.3->85.0% and recall@3 81.7->95.0% on a 60-query gold set (Turkish 37.5->75, paraphrase 41.7->66.7), no regressions, 1063 tests green. Core invariant: new ranking signals feed a derived rankScore; raw hit.score stays flat-BM25 so hook gate thresholds are unaffected. Batch 2: continuous capture (auto transcript digest on SessionStart catch-up + auto-salience bookmarks + recall indexing + knowledge_access feedback) implementing the brain's awake-ripple tagging, guarded by CAPTURE_RANK_PENALTY 0.5 + K=50 digest cap (proven 0 true displacement; fixed a latent created_at Date-parse bug). Batch 3: explore recall allowlist + revived dead .env gate. Consolidation: 3 changelog entries, 2 memory decisions, soul stale keyword-search rule -> BM25F, new knowledge/recall-engine-v2.md, updated memory-recall-bm25 + sleep-consolidation PRDs, roadmap tasks -> in_review (Wave 0-2 + guard done; Wave 3-4 remain). Also v0.5.4 update-prune fix. v0.5.4 publishable; v0.6.0 in planning.
